candidates.title: Config 'pyproject.toml' referenced in 3 repos
candidates.description: The config source/key 'pyproject.toml' appears in 3 repos (python-build-standalone, ruff, ruff-pre-commit). Consider centralising this configuration to reduce duplication and drift risk.

candidates.title: 4 repos share CI/CD pattern: github actions/github actions
candidates.description: Repos python-build-standalone, ruff-pre-commit, ruff-vscode, setup-uv all use github actions for CI and github actions for CD. Consider a shared workflow template or reusable action to reduce maintenance overhead.

candidates.title: ruff-pre-commit is a thin wrapper around ruff
candidates.description: ruff-pre-commit has 2 outbound deps, 1 of which point to ruff. Purpose: 'Pre-commit hook wrapper for Ruff linter/formatter'. Could potentially be consolidated into ruff or maintained as a minimal adapter.

candidates.title: ruff and uv have overlapping purposes
candidates.description: Purpose overlap: 57%. 'An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust' vs 'An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust'. Language overlap: 50%.

candidates.title: Python repos use different build tools
candidates.description: Build tool fragmentation for python: cargo (python-build-standalone, ruff, uv), docker (python-build-standalone), makefiles (python-build-standalone), maturin (ruff, uv), npm (ruff-vscode, ruff), uv (python-build-standalone, ruff-pre-commit), vsce (ruff-vscode), wasm-pack (ruff), webpack (ruff-vscode)

candidates.title: Rust repos use different build tools
candidates.description: Build tool fragmentation for rust: cargo (python-build-standalone, ruff, uv), docker (python-build-standalone), makefiles (python-build-standalone), maturin (ruff, uv), npm (ruff), uv (python-build-standalone), wasm-pack (ruff)

candidates.title: Typescript repos use different build tools
candidates.description: Build tool fragmentation for typescript: @vercel/ncc (setup-uv), cargo (ruff), esbuild (setup-uv), maturin (ruff), npm (ruff-vscode, ruff, setup-uv), vsce (ruff-vscode), wasm-pack (ruff), webpack (ruff-vscode)
